action.reasoning: Observation: Best is iter-4 MSE 0.4867. Recent NLinear gave 0.4915. Time remaining ~51min, 15 iters left. Actually, let me try a different simple approach: linear regression with closed-form solution using train data only, ridge regression. This is deterministic and strong on ETTh1. Decision: Try ridge regression closed-form (channel-independent NLinear style: predict residual from last value). This avoids overfitting issues with SGD.
